query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A pale blue-toned figure resembling a draped female form stands against vertical white and pale blue curtains. The figure wears flowing fabric that cascades from the shoulders to the floor in soft folds. The background consists of sheer curtain panels with subtle vertical striations.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal, ghostly female figure dissolves into motion blur and double-exposure layering against pale curtain panels, her face and hair fragmented into flowing, overlapping impressions. Muted, washed-out cyan and white tones dominate, with extreme overexposure bleaching most detail into near-ethereal flatness. The intentional blur and translucent overlapping forms create an abstract, dreamlike apparition where body, fabric, and background merge into indistinction, evoking a melancholic, otherworldly atmosphere through its deliberate surrender of clarity and form.
